title: Verify discount offer appears after loss aversion warning
description: Test that if user persists in cancelling after loss aversion warning, the incentive offer with discount is displayed

steps.description: 1. Log in with trial user account
4. On Loss Aversion Exit Gate, click 'Cancel Anyway'

expected_result: Discount offer popup appears with 'Lock in 50% off your first month now' or similar backend-configured offer with price and trust clause
